name: Skill Performance Benchmarking
description: Builds and runs task suites that measure whether agents select, invoke, and complete installed skills correctly across artifact-rich workflows and repeated trials.
conditions: Requires a skill corpus, benchmark tasks, success rubrics, and variance-aware reporting across multiple runs.

evidence.notes: AgentSkillOS paper introduces ecosystem-scale organization, orchestration, and benchmarking with a 30-task suite spanning data computation, documents, video, design, and web interaction. (backfilled — class-to-type migration)

Anthropic skill-creator explicitly includes measuring skill performance, benchmarking with variance analysis, and optimizing skill descriptions for triggering accuracy. (backfilled — class-to-type migration)

AgentSkillOS repository provides the reproducible retrieval/orchestration framework and benchmark implementation for 30 artifact-rich agent-skill tasks with Bradley-Terry scoring. (backfilled — class-to-type migration)

timeline.details: Re-graded evidence from https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02176 as A (trustNumber: 85.0)
Re-graded evidence from https://github.com/ynulihao/AgentSkillOS as B (trustNumber: 70.0)
